articles.title: How Kristin Cabot, made famous by Coldplay jumbotron, is navigating life post-anonymity
articles.description:
Last Friday night, Kristin Cabot went to a Jack Johnson concert in New Hampshire, a low-key show that, for her, had one major thing in its favor: “No jumbotron — only the one that showed him.” It was Cabot’s first time going to a concert since the one, literally, heard ’round the world, when a […]

The post How Kristin Cabot, made famous by Coldplay jumbotron, is navigating life post-anonymity appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kristin Cabot attended her first concert since gaining fame at a Coldplay show.
She enjoyed a low-key Jack Johnson concert in New Hampshire on a recent Friday.
Cabot's experience highlights challenges of post-anonymity for Boston residents in public spaces.

articles.title: Sewer spill closes North Shore beaches after Haverhill pipe breaks
articles.description:
Two sewer main breaks during Friday’s torrential rain sent wastewater into the Merrimack River, prompting beach closures.

The post Sewer spill closes North Shore beaches after Haverhill pipe breaks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sewer main breaks released wastewater into the Merrimack River during Friday's heavy rain.
North Shore beaches are closed due to contamination from the Haverhill pipe breaks.
Local residents are advised to avoid river activities until further notice.
